issue_sections.name: description
issue_sections.purpose: Summarize the maintenance objective, operator impact, and expected reliability gain.
issue_sections.example:
- Objective: harden wrapper validation for malformed payloads
- Impact: deterministic operator diagnostics

issue_sections.name: context
issue_sections.purpose: Capture incident history, constraints, and operational background for maintainers.

issue_sections.name: scope
issue_sections.purpose: Define touched files, protected boundaries, and explicit non-goals for this maintenance slice.

issue_sections.name: acceptance_criteria
issue_sections.purpose: List deterministic completion checks for maintenance outcomes and compatibility.

issue_sections.name: technical_notes
issue_sections.purpose: Record implementation choices, migration considerations, and fail-closed behavior.

issue_sections.name: testing_strategy
issue_sections.purpose: Specify fast validation commands and targeted tests that protect regressions.

issue_sections.name: edge_cases
issue_sections.purpose: Enumerate malformed input, fallback, and error-reporting edge conditions.

issue_sections.name: example_usage
issue_sections.purpose: Provide concise operator-facing examples that clarify expected behavior.

issue_sections.name: references
issue_sections.purpose: Link runbooks, issues, and source files needed for maintenance execution.
